cards.back: A situation where two or more threads are waiting for each other to release a resource
A situation where two or more threads are constantly switching between each other, neither making progress
A situation where a thread is unable to access a shared resource because other threads are holding onto it for an extended period
A situation where a higher-priority thread is unable to access a shared resource because a lower-priority thread is holding onto it
A situation where multiple threads are competing for access to a shared resource, such as a CPU or I/O device
